@marymad You heard of anyone arrested at #OccupyOakland getting calls asking about police misconduct? Or being asked to 'come in' to talk?

Anyone else arrested at #OccupyOakland receive calls from #OPD regarding police misconduct? Anyone else get calls asking them to "come in"?

@KellySutton That's cool, was a longshot anyway. Really, could do lots with just title, date posted, and upvotes. Anything more is icing.
@KellySutton As long as it's before Dec 31st. =P - poster ID, title, url, date posted, # of upvotes, # of comments, views? - would be sick.
@KellySutton Let me know if you could throw a big CSV of posts or an API endpoint my way. =]
@KellySutton Like that one a lot, but not really the best for telling the story. I'm thinkin stuff like streamgraph: http://t.co/dgn84azNuI
@KellySutton Maybe just a big list/API of all the posts with the title / upvotes / day it was posted? could do a lot with that + members. =]
@KellySutton Actually, when is DN's birthday? Might be interesting to throw some more data together and do a year retrospective.
@KellySutton When I get a spare second I'll go at it again, tho I think another viz method is more apt now. Got any more data? =]
@KellySutton Yeah I noticed that, the force layout was tuned to like, 200 members anyway. Last time it worked it was 100% dots.
